summary: Pioglitazone has no established efficacy based on existing clinical trial data for delaying cognitive decline or impairing development in individuals at risk for Alzheimer's disease. There are currently no published studies directly assessing its impact on cognition in this population.

There are currently no published studies directly assessing its impact on cognition in this population.. Answer choice: B
